name: Golf Lab CT
about: Golf Lab CT is a members-only indoor golf club in Fairfield, Connecticut, providing private access to three Trackman simulator rooms, a PuttView putting studio, and a GolfForever training room. The facility operates on a self-serve basis with 24/7 access, emphasizing convenience and technology-driven practice in a member-capped environment. Membership is required for access, with rental rates available for members who want to use the simulators, putting studio, and training room on their own schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 self-serve access to private, state-of-the-art simulator rooms
Premium Trackman technology with AI-driven swing analysis and course simulation
Member-capped environment ensuring privacy and no wait times
Comprehensive practice options including Trackman simulators, PuttView studio, and GolfForever training

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB facility; members can bring their own food and drinks
BYOB facility; members can bring their own alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end golf simulation and launch-monitor system with radar and optical sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility is BYOB (Bring Your Own Clubs), so members are expected to bring their own golf clubs for use in the simulators and putting studio.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Lab CT is a BYOB facility, allowing members to bring their own food and alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play in the simulator rooms.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior coaching programs and is suitable for youth golfers under the guidance of the PGA professionals on staff.
